tasks.name: Daily Blog Post
tasks.description: Research latest news in WordPress, AI tools, and automation. Write a 600-800 word post in the Rubenchis Bot voice. Publish to rubenchis.bot via git push to the Next.js repo. Generate a featured image if needed.
tasks.notes: Working repo is /tmp/fresh-clone. Uses web_search (minimax provider) for research. Model: minimax/MiniMax-M3. Currently has delivery issues — Telegram target chatId missing.

tasks.name: AgentMail Inbox Check
tasks.description: Check openclaw@rubenchis.bot inbox for new messages. Only report if there are new messages.

tasks.name: Memory & Notes Maintenance
tasks.description: Write daily memory notes to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Periodically review daily files and curate significant events, lessons, and insights into MEMORY.md. Keep workspace docs updated.

tasks.name: Heartbeat Periodic Checks
tasks.description: On each heartbeat, check AgentMail for new emails. Rotating checks for calendar events, social mentions, weather. Stay quiet late night (11 PM - 8 AM) unless urgent.

tasks.name: Reminders & Scheduled Tasks
tasks.description: Set one-shot or recurring reminders and scheduled tasks via cron. Wake events for immediate follow-ups.
tasks.notes: Uses cron tool with systemEvent or agentTurn payloads

tasks.name: On-Demand User Assistance
tasks.description: Ad-hoc tasks for Rubenchis: web research, file management, code work, automation setup, image generation, messaging, debugging systems.

tasks.name: Workspace & Config Management
tasks.description: Maintain the OpenClaw workspace at ~/.openclaw/workspace. Keep TOOLS.md, AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, USER.md, HEARTBEAT.md current. Manage scripts, skills, and plugin configuration.

maintenance_notes: This file should be updated whenever responsibilities change — new cron jobs, new integrations, retired tasks. Alex (OpenClaw) is responsible for keeping this current.
standing_orders: Update this file whenever a new task, cron job, or integration is created.
Update when a task is retired, disabled, or its scope changes.
Keep this file accurate — Rubenchis relies on it to track what Alex does.
